name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
description: Apex Cretaceous predator with a crushing bite—powerful legs, massive skull, pure dominance.

name: Triceratops
description: Horned Cretaceous grazer with a massive frill—likely stood its ground against big predators.

name: Velociraptor
description: Small, fast Cretaceous hunter with a sickle claw—quick, alert, and opportunistic.

name: Stegosaurus
description: A Jurassic plant-eater with back plates and a spiked tail—defensive armor more than speed.

name: Brachiosaurus
description: Towering Jurassic browser with long forelegs—reached treetops other giants couldn’t.

name: Allosaurus
description: Large Jurassic predator with serrated teeth—one of the top hunters of its ecosystem.

name: Plateosaurus
description: An early long-necked Triassic herbivore—sturdy, adaptable, and built for long-distance browsing.

name: Ankylosaurus
description: Armored Cretaceous tank with a tail club—built to absorb hits and strike back.

name: Parasaurolophus
description: Crested Cretaceous hadrosaur—its hollow crest may have boosted calls across herds.
